VFR Transitions
Visual Reference Points
Code Designation VOR & Radial Distance Remarks
NG NOVEMBER GOLF DS 017º 20.8 -
N1 NOVEMBER ONE DS 329º 14.6 -
NK NOVEMBER KILO DS 357º 16.5 -
E3 ECHO THREE DS 085º 3.3 -
E4 ECHO FOUR DS 077º 20.8 -
S1 SIERRA ONE DS 124º 21.1 -
W2 WHISKEY TWO DS 290º 21.3 -
SW SIERRA WHISKEY DS 275º 6.2 -
E5 ECHO FIVE DS 047º 21.4 -
SN SIERRA NOVEMBER DS 163º 7.3 -
E2 ECHO TWO DS 165º 18.5 -
TS TANGO SIERRA DS 056º 8.8 -
SN and S2 are reserved for arrivals and departures to Saly Airfield.
E5 is reserved for arrivals and departures to This Military Aerodrome.

Helicopter Operations

  • TLOF is available on TWY M, next to the threshold of RWY 19.

GOOY Leopold Sedar Senghor | v0.1
